use_cases.title: Build a Second Brain
use_cases.description: Capture, connect, and resurface notes, bookmarks, and ideas into a searchable personal knowledge base.
use_cases.success_criteria: Any saved note or idea is retrievable in seconds via natural language search.
use_cases.pain_today: Notes are scattered across apps and rarely revisited.

use_cases.title: Never Lose Meeting Context
use_cases.description: Automatically transcribe, summarize, and extract action items from every meeting into a searchable log.
use_cases.success_criteria: Every meeting produces a summary with owners and due dates within 5 minutes of ending.
use_cases.pain_today: Action items get lost and follow-ups require re-reading long transcripts.

use_cases.title: Deep Research Synthesis
use_cases.description: Aggregate and synthesize information from dozens of sources into a structured, cited research brief.
use_cases.success_criteria: A cited brief covering all key sources is produced in under 30 minutes.
use_cases.pain_today: Manually reading and synthesizing dozens of sources takes days.

use_cases.title: Weekly Status Report on Autopilot
use_cases.description: Auto-generate a polished weekly status report by pulling data from tasks, calendars, and project tools.
use_cases.success_criteria: A formatted status report is ready to send every Friday with zero manual writing.
use_cases.pain_today: Writing status reports consumes 30-60 minutes of focused time each week.

use_cases.title: Create Professional Documents Fast
use_cases.description: Transform rough notes or bullet points into polished reports, proposals, or SOPs using AI writing assistance.
use_cases.success_criteria: A publication-ready document is produced from raw notes in under 15 minutes.
use_cases.pain_today: Formatting and polishing documents takes longer than generating the underlying ideas.

use_cases.title: Build an Accessible React App
use_cases.description: Generate and audit React components to meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards from the start.
use_cases.success_criteria: All components pass automated WCAG 2.1 AA checks before code review.
use_cases.pain_today: Accessibility issues are discovered late in the cycle, requiring expensive rework.

use_cases.title: Refactor Legacy Code Safely
use_cases.description: Analyze, test, and incrementally refactor legacy codebases with AI-guided safety nets.
use_cases.success_criteria: Refactored modules have >80% test coverage and no regression failures.
use_cases.pain_today: Fear of breaking untested legacy code slows refactoring to a crawl.

use_cases.title: CI/CD Pipeline in 30 Minutes
use_cases.description: Scaffold a fully working CI/CD pipeline with tests, linting, and deployment steps from a single prompt.
search_queries: fast CI setup for web project
use_cases.success_criteria: Green CI pipeline running on every PR within 30 minutes of project creation.
use_cases.pain_today: Setting up CI/CD from scratch is tedious and easy to misconfigure.

use_cases.title: Design System from Scratch
use_cases.description: Generate a consistent, token-based design system with components, documentation, and Storybook stories.
use_cases.success_criteria: A documented component library with at least 20 components is ready for team use.
use_cases.pain_today: Building a design system from scratch takes weeks of coordination between design and engineering.

use_cases.title: Add Real-Time Features Without the Complexity
use_cases.description: Integrate WebSocket or SSE-based real-time functionality into an existing app with minimal boilerplate.
use_cases.success_criteria: Live updates are visible in the UI within 200ms of a server-side event.
use_cases.pain_today: Real-time infrastructure is complex to set up correctly and easy to get wrong under load.

use_cases.title: Future-Proof API Design
use_cases.description: Design versioned, well-documented REST or GraphQL APIs that are easy to evolve without breaking clients.
use_cases.success_criteria: API spec is published with versioning strategy and all endpoints documented.
use_cases.pain_today: Undocumented APIs accumulate breaking changes that surprise downstream consumers.

use_cases.title: Monolith to Microservices Migration
use_cases.description: Identify domain boundaries in a monolith and generate a phased migration plan with service scaffolding.
use_cases.success_criteria: First service extracted and running independently with all tests passing.
use_cases.pain_today: Monolith decomposition is risky without a clear, incremental plan.

use_cases.title: Observability Quick Setup
use_cases.description: Instrument a backend service with distributed tracing, structured logs, and metrics in under an hour.
use_cases.success_criteria: Traces, logs, and key metrics visible in a dashboard within one hour.
use_cases.pain_today: Adding observability is deferred because instrumentation feels like a large project.

use_cases.title: Handle 10x Traffic Without Rewriting
use_cases.description: Profile, identify bottlenecks, and apply targeted caching and scaling strategies to an existing backend.
use_cases.success_criteria: P99 latency stays under 200ms after a 10x load test with no code rewrites.
use_cases.pain_today: Performance bottlenecks are hard to locate quickly under production pressure.

use_cases.title: Zero-Downtime Database Migrations
use_cases.description: Plan and execute database schema changes that are backward-compatible and safe to run on live traffic.
use_cases.success_criteria: Migration runs on production with zero errors and no downtime in the deployment window.
use_cases.pain_today: Schema migrations require maintenance windows and carry high risk of data loss or downtime.

use_cases.title: One Codebase for iOS and Android
use_cases.description: Scaffold a cross-platform mobile app that shares business logic while delivering native UI on each platform.
search_queries: React Native Flutter shared codebase scaffold
use_cases.success_criteria: App builds and runs on both iOS and Android from a single repository.
use_cases.pain_today: Maintaining two separate native codebases doubles effort and causes feature drift.

use_cases.title: Offline-First Data Sync
use_cases.description: Implement reliable offline data persistence and conflict-resolving sync for a mobile app.
use_cases.success_criteria: Data changes made offline sync correctly within 5 seconds of reconnection.
use_cases.pain_today: Offline sync with conflict resolution is one of the hardest problems in mobile development.

use_cases.title: Push Notifications That Actually Work
use_cases.description: Set up cross-platform push notifications with delivery guarantees, deep linking, and opt-in analytics.
use_cases.success_criteria: Notifications deliver reliably on both platforms with tracked open rates and working deep links.
use_cases.pain_today: Push notification stacks are fragmented across APNs, FCM, and vendor SDKs.

use_cases.title: Painless App Store Submission
use_cases.description: Automate build signing, metadata generation, and submission checklists for App Store and Google Play.
use_cases.success_criteria: New releases are submitted to both stores via a single CI trigger with no manual steps.
use_cases.pain_today: App store submissions involve repetitive manual steps prone to rejection for metadata errors.

use_cases.title: Native Feel on Every Platform
use_cases.description: Apply platform-specific UI adaptations so a cross-platform app feels native on both iOS and Android.
search_queries: platform adaptive UI React Native Flutter
iOS Android UI convention guide AI
use_cases.success_criteria: User testing panel cannot distinguish the app from a native app on either platform.
use_cases.pain_today: Cross-platform apps often feel generic or break platform conventions, hurting user experience.

use_cases.title: Get Your Team Adopting IaC
use_cases.description: Generate Terraform or Pulumi modules from existing cloud resources and create onboarding docs for the team.
use_cases.success_criteria: All new infrastructure is provisioned via IaC with peer-reviewed PRs within 4 weeks.
use_cases.pain_today: Cloud resources created manually drift from intended state and block team collaboration.

use_cases.title: Zero-Downtime Deployments
use_cases.description: Implement blue-green or canary deployment pipelines so every release reaches production without user impact.
use_cases.success_criteria: Deployments complete with zero failed health checks and no user-reported downtime.
use_cases.pain_today: Releases require maintenance windows or risk user-facing errors during cutover.

use_cases.title: Fix Alert Fatigue
use_cases.description: Audit existing alerts, remove noise, and rebuild a tiered alerting strategy tied to real user impact.
use_cases.success_criteria: On-call engineers receive fewer than 5 actionable pages per week with no missed incidents.
use_cases.pain_today: High alert volume causes engineers to ignore notifications, masking real incidents.

use_cases.title: Disaster Recovery That's Actually Tested
use_cases.description: Automate DR runbooks and schedule regular failover drills so recovery procedures are validated before a crisis.
use_cases.success_criteria: Full failover completes within defined RTO in quarterly automated drills.
use_cases.pain_today: DR plans exist on paper but are rarely tested, leading to failures under real incidents.

use_cases.title: Kubernetes Made Practical
use_cases.description: Generate production-grade Kubernetes manifests, Helm charts, and RBAC policies for a new service.
use_cases.success_criteria: Service is running in a production Kubernetes cluster with health checks and RBAC in place.
use_cases.pain_today: Kubernetes has a steep learning curve and misconfigured manifests are hard to debug.

use_cases.title: Experiment Tracking for ML Teams
use_cases.description: Set up an experiment tracking system that logs hyperparameters, metrics, and artifacts for every model run.
use_cases.success_criteria: Every training run is logged and comparable in a shared experiment dashboard.
use_cases.pain_today: Teams rerun experiments accidentally and cannot reproduce past results without manual notes.

use_cases.title: Reproducible ML Pipeline
use_cases.description: Package a training pipeline with versioned data, code, and environments so any run can be exactly reproduced.
use_cases.success_criteria: Any historical run reproduces identical metrics when re-executed from the same commit.
use_cases.pain_today: Models trained weeks ago cannot be reproduced because data or code has silently changed.

use_cases.title: Self-Serve Model Deployment
use_cases.description: Package a trained model as a versioned REST API with monitoring and rollback so any team member can deploy.
search_queries: deploy ML model as REST API
use_cases.success_criteria: Any data scientist can deploy a new model version to production in under 30 minutes.
use_cases.pain_today: Model deployment requires engineering involvement, creating a bottleneck for data science teams.

use_cases.title: Clean Messy Data at Scale
use_cases.description: Profile, validate, and repair a large dataset using AI-suggested rules before it enters a model or warehouse.
search_queries: AI data cleaning pipeline large dataset
use_cases.success_criteria: Dataset passes all quality checks with less than 0.1% null or out-of-range values.
use_cases.pain_today: Data cleaning consumes up to 80% of a data scientist's time and is largely manual.

use_cases.title: Build a RAG System Over Your Data
use_cases.description: Implement a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline that lets users query internal documents with accurate citations.
search_queries: vector search LLM over private data
use_cases.success_criteria: Queries return accurate, cited answers from internal documents with <2s latency.
use_cases.pain_today: LLMs hallucinate when asked about proprietary data not in their training set.

use_cases.title: Fast Vulnerability Audit
use_cases.description: Scan a codebase or container image for known CVEs and dependency vulnerabilities and generate a prioritized fix list.
use_cases.success_criteria: All critical and high CVEs are identified and assigned owners within one working day.
use_cases.pain_today: Manual vulnerability audits are slow and often incomplete, leaving critical issues undetected.

use_cases.title: Automated Compliance Checks
use_cases.description: Map infrastructure and code to SOC 2 or ISO 27001 controls and surface gaps with remediation steps.
use_cases.success_criteria: Compliance dashboard shows coverage per control with actionable remediation tickets.
use_cases.pain_today: Compliance evidence collection is manual, error-prone, and consumes engineering sprints before audits.

use_cases.title: Safe Secrets Rotation
use_cases.description: Automate credential rotation across services with zero-downtime cutover and audit logging.
use_cases.success_criteria: All secrets rotate on schedule with full audit logs and no service interruptions.
use_cases.pain_today: Credentials are rarely rotated because the process is manual and risks breaking dependent services.

use_cases.title: Systematic Threat Modeling
use_cases.description: Generate a STRIDE threat model for a system design and produce a prioritized list of mitigations.
search_queries: automated threat model from architecture diagram
use_cases.success_criteria: Threat model document is reviewed and top 10 mitigations are in the backlog before development starts.
use_cases.pain_today: Threat modeling is skipped because it feels like a heavyweight, specialist-only process.

use_cases.title: Adaptive Incident Response
use_cases.description: Generate real-time response runbooks during a security incident by correlating alerts with known attack patterns.
use_cases.success_criteria: Responders have a contextualized action plan within 10 minutes of incident declaration.
use_cases.pain_today: Incident responders waste critical time searching runbooks and Slack history during high-stress events.

use_cases.title: Ship an MVP in a Weekend
use_cases.description: Scaffold a full-stack web app with auth, database, and a landing page from a product description.
search_queries: generate full stack MVP from idea
use_cases.success_criteria: A working app is live at a public URL with at least 3 core features by Sunday evening.
use_cases.pain_today: Founders spend weeks on boilerplate before building anything users can test.

use_cases.title: Add Payments Without the Headache
use_cases.description: Integrate Stripe subscriptions, invoicing, and a customer portal into an existing app in hours.
search_queries: add payments to SaaS app fast
use_cases.success_criteria: Users can subscribe, pay, and manage their plan without contacting support.
use_cases.pain_today: Payment integration takes days and billing edge cases are easy to miss.

use_cases.title: Idea to Landing Page in Minutes
use_cases.description: Generate a high-converting landing page with copy, visuals, and a waitlist form from a one-paragraph pitch.
search_queries: AI landing page generator from idea
use_cases.success_criteria: Landing page is live with a working waitlist form and conversion tracking within 2 hours.
use_cases.pain_today: Founders wait weeks for designers to build landing pages before validating demand.

use_cases.title: Actionable Analytics from Day One
use_cases.description: Instrument a new product with event tracking and build a dashboard showing the metrics that drive growth decisions.
search_queries: product analytics setup startup Mixpanel Amplitude
use_cases.success_criteria: Core activation and retention metrics are visible in a live dashboard on launch day.
use_cases.pain_today: Startups launch without tracking and can't explain why users churn.

use_cases.title: Automate User Onboarding
use_cases.description: Build an onboarding flow with triggered emails, in-app checklists, and progress tracking to activate new users.
use_cases.success_criteria: 80% of new users complete the onboarding checklist within their first session.
use_cases.pain_today: Manual onboarding doesn't scale and new users drop off before experiencing core value.

use_cases.title: Add an AI Feature Without a Machine Learning Team
use_cases.description: Integrate an LLM-powered feature such as smart search, content generation, or summarization into an existing product.
search_queries: add AI feature to SaaS no ML team
use_cases.success_criteria: AI feature is live in production with usage metrics and a feedback loop for quality improvement.
use_cases.pain_today: Founders assume AI features require a data science team, delaying competitive differentiation.
